problem.title: LiTAMIN2 cluster T1 on MulRan parkinglot full (CT-ICP cluster A territory)
problem.question: LiTAMIN2 cluster T1 (voxel=0.5 + iter=12 + seed) is universal on KITTI Odom 5/5. CT-ICP cluster A + seed wins MulRan parkinglot full at 9.19 m. Does LiTAMIN2 T1 dethrone it?

variants.label: cluster T1: voxel=0.5 + iter=12 + seed
variants.intent: Transfer KITTI Odom universal recipe to MulRan parkinglot.
